entries.title: Genesis 28:1
entries.author: R. A. Torrey (editor)
entries.content:
sent. Mal 3:1; Lu 9:52; 14:31,32 land.The land, or mountains, of Seir was situated south and east of the Dead Sea; forming a continuation of the eastern Syrian chain of mountains, beginning with Antilibanus, and extending from thence to the eastern gulf of the Red Sea.

Seir. 14:6; 33:14,16; 36:6-8; De 2:5,22; Jos 24:4 country. Heb. field. Edom. 25:30
